prompt_preview:
Campaign: Creative Workflow Push
Audience: growth teams shipping paid social creative weekly
Objective: Improve confidence in social copy before launch
Key message: Move from brief to review-ready copy with clearer brand and policy checks.
Strategy: tool_aware
Brand notes: Lead with the practical benefit before the feature., Prefer specific workflow language over hype.
Avoid terms: guaranteed, instant, #1, magic
Placement caps: headline=50 description=110 cta=18
Policy disallowed claims: guaranteed, instant, #1
